word: G3182 - μεθύσκω - methýskō - meth-oos'-ko - Be drunk

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μεθύσκω

- Transliteration: methusko

- Phonetic: meth-oos'-ko

- Definition:

1. to intoxicate, make drunk

2. to get drunk, become intoxicated

- Origin: a prolonged (transitive) form of G3184

- TDNT entry: 4:545,*

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: A prolonged (transitive) form of G3184; to intoxicate: - be drunk (-en).
